sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Looking at the image, the 3x6 green box is now below the charcoal box again. It seems like the box is not fitting into the charcoal box properly. Let me check the current positions.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"green: boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
    if n['color'] == 'c':
        print(f"charcoal: boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: USER PROMPT

If `MOUSE` is valid, use integer `row` and `col`.

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The 3x6 green box is at rows 57-59, cols 48-53. The charcoal box is at rows 38-42, cols 53-60. The green box is way below the charcoal box. I need to move it UP significantly.
The charcoal interior is rows 39-41, cols 54-59. The green box is at rows 57-59, cols 48-53.
To get to rows 39-41: need UP 57-39=18
To get to cols 54-59: need RIGHT 54-48=6

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Move 3x6 green box UP and RIGHT into the charcoal box
action(['UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT', 'RIGHT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
